name: Etilefrine
description: Etilefrine is an adrenergic agonist that appears to interact with beta-2 and some alpha adrenergic receptors. It has been used as a vasoconstrictor agent.

interactions.name: Iobenguane
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Iobenguane can be decreased when used in combination with Etilefrine.

interactions.name: Cabergoline
interactions.description: Cabergoline may increase the hypertensive activities of Etilefrine.

interactions.name: Bromocriptine
interactions.description: Bromocriptine may increase the hypertensive activities of Etilefrine.

interactions.name: Methylergometrine
interactions.description: Methylergometrine may increase the hypertensive activities of Etilefrine.

interactions.description: Dihydroergotamine may increase the hypertensive activities of Etilefrine.

interactions.name: Venlafaxine
